attacking_style: Long-range solo attacks on final climbs (8-17km to go), excelling in breakaway scenarios rather than GC group raids. Prefers sustained climbing efforts to explosive accelerations.
team_tactics: AG2R provides minimal mountain support, often forcing solo defense of GC position. Occasionally deploys as team domestique (Gall pacing). Positioned in breakaways for opportunistic time gains.
terrain_preference: Steep sustained climbs (12km+) where diesel engine excels. Improved time trialing no longer major weakness (2023). Vulnerable in echelon splits but showed positioning improvement (Paris-Nice 2022).
vulnerability: Catastrophic GC collapses after single bad day (lost 9+ mins Tour 2022, dropped to 5:58 Tour 2021). Exposed when caught by surprise by explosive accelerations. Lacks team support for prolonged mountain defense.
key_patterns: Long solo breakaway wins: 17km (Tignes), 12km (La Molina), 8km (Madonna di Campiglio)
GC fragility: multiple instances of 9+ minute losses destroying top-10 ambitions despite strong form
Aggressive final kilometer attacks when protecting podium positions, recalling 2021 4th overall form
Excels in multi-day breakaway efforts with exceptional recovery (consecutive Giro break days)
Strongest as sustained climber vs pure sprinters; vulnerable in uphill sprints after hard racing
Poor pacing judgment when attacking too early from breaks (Vuelta 2019)
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Dauphine podium and aggressive Tour riding signals return to 2021-2022 GC form after setbacks. Time trial weakness addressed.
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4
